description: Heartbeat instructions must not keep watching a stale fixed task id instead of rediscovering current repo, ledger, worktree, and queue truth.

files.docs/reviews/local-transcript-heartbeat-: Sanitized transcript fixture: the 5-minute heartbeat instruction says every 5 minutes check TF-OLD-QUEUE-017 and keep watching that task. It binds the heartbeat to a stale task id instead of dynamically reading the current repo, ledger, worktree list, and queue frontier.
